site.name: MASON
site.tagline: Construction project management software built for GC and specialty sub teams — BIM, RFIs, schedules, and cost tracking in one platform.

hero.headline:
One command center
for construction control.
hero.subheadline: BIM, schedule, RFIs, daily logs, change orders, and cost tracking — one construction management platform for GC and specialty sub teams under 50 people. The AI Concierge knows your project. The pricing is flat.

stats.label:
BIM model opens
in any browser

testimonials.quote: The BIM viewer on a phone browser, without installing anything, is what convinced me. I have been fighting with Autodesk licences for years on projects where half the team just needs to look at the model, not author it. MASON just opens the model.
testimonials.name: Kwame O.

testimonials.quote: We switched from Procore mid-project. The migration was smoother than expected and the per-project pricing immediately saved us money because we were paying per-user on a 60-person site team. The AI Concierge was the unexpected benefit. Our RFI response time dropped from 9 days to 3 days.
testimonials.name: Fatima A.
testimonials.role: Senior Project Manager, Mixed-use Development, UAE

testimonials.quote: The offline mode on Android is what the field team needed. We work in underground structures with no signal for hours at a time. Daily logs, issue creation, and photo capture all work offline and sync the moment we come back above ground. No data lost.
testimonials.name: Marco S.

tiers.name: Core
tiers.tagline: Everything you need to run a job. For teams on up to 3 active projects.
features: Daily logs, photos, and field reports
RFIs with ball-in-court tracking
Change orders — digital sign-off before work starts
Gantt schedule + critical path
Budget vs. actual cost tracking
AIA G702/G703 pay applications
Android app — works offline on site
Mason AI — 60 queries per project per month
Email support

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.tagline: Core PM plus BIM, Navisworks-class clash detection, AR, and Monte Carlo scheduling.
features: Everything in Core
BIM viewer — browser-based IFC, no Autodesk license needed
Clash detection — BVH narrow-phase engine (same algorithm class as Navisworks)
AR walkthrough — Android WebXR + iOS AR Quick Look
Monte Carlo scheduling — P50 / P80 / P90 risk bands, 1,000-iteration simulation
Mason AI — unlimited queries
Priority email support — 24-hr response

tiers.name: Founding Partner
tiers.tagline: Pro access at $129/month, locked for life. First 10 firms — in exchange for direct feedback.
features: Everything in Pro
Price locked at $129/mo for life (stays as long as you stay subscribed)
Direct line to the founding team
Your input shapes what gets built next

enterprise.heading: Enterprise — custom contract
enterprise.body: Managing 50+ concurrent projects, integrating with a corporate ERP, or requiring a dedicated infrastructure tenant? We build custom contracts for large programmes. Contact us to discuss volume pricing, on-premises options, and dedicated support.

faq.q: What counts toward the user limit?
faq.a: Anyone with a MASON login on your account -- staff, subs, client reps. Core covers 10 users. Pro covers 25. Most site teams with a handful of subs fit comfortably in Pro.

faq.q: What counts as an active project?
faq.a: Any project you're working in right now. Archive it when the job closes and it stops counting. Archived projects keep all their data -- they just don't take up a slot.

faq.q: What happens if we hit a limit?
faq.a: We'll flag it and give you a window to upgrade before anything stops working. We're not going to lock you out mid-job.

We're running a hands-on pilot program right now -- not a self-serve trial. Book a call and we'll set your team up on a real job for 14 days. You get the full product, we handle setup, and at day 14 you decide whether to stay on.

faq.q: What is the Founding Partner offer?
faq.a: Ten firms get Pro access at $129/month, locked permanently as long as they stay subscribed. That's BIM viewer, Navisworks-class clash detection, AR walkthrough, Monte Carlo scheduling, 25 users, 10 projects -- at $129 instead of $399. The trade: we want direct feedback on what to build next.
Yes. Annual billing on Core and Pro saves 20%. Founding Partner pricing is already locked at $129 -- no additional annual discount applies.
